tasks.description: Create baseline test matrix covering GUI mode, CLI mode, and API mode with GGUF path variations and upload paths
tasks.acceptance: Matrix document exists with test scenarios for each mode and configuration combination

tasks.description: Execute baseline tests and capture failing code paths for each confirmed defect
tasks.acceptance: Bug ledger created with confirmed root cause, repro steps, and failing code locations for all 6 confirmed defects

tasks.description: Create regression test stubs for each confirmed defect that will verify fixes
tasks.acceptance: Test files created in tests/regression/ directory with failing assertions for each defect

tasks.description: Fix GUI initialization in app_gui.py to pass gguf_path parameter instead of model_path to RAGEngine
tasks.acceptance: GUI passes gguf_path from settings to engine constructor; existing tests pass

tasks.description: Fix API server lifespan in api_server.py to read RAG_GGUF_PATH environment variable and pass to RAGEngine
tasks.acceptance: API server reads RAG_GGUF_PATH and passes gguf_path to engine; test verifies env var flows to engine

tasks.description: Audit repository for remaining semantic misuse of model_path versus gguf_path including migration code and tests
tasks.acceptance: Grep report shows all model_path/gguf_path usages; any mismatches are documented and fixed

tasks.description: Create unified engine construction helper if needed to ensure all modes use shared path
tasks.acceptance: All three modes (GUI, CLI, API) route through shared helper or equivalent normalization; tests verify consistency

tasks.description: Update validate_url() in api_server.py to allow localhost, 127.0.0.1, ::1 for explicitly local backends
tasks.acceptance: Local URLs accepted when allow_local flag is set; remote URLs still rejected

tasks.description: Add DNS rebinding protection by resolving hostname and validating IP against whitelist
tasks.acceptance: URL validation resolves hostname and checks resolved IP; DNS rebinding attacks are blocked

tasks.description: Update validate_model_path() to allow absolute Windows paths while preventing traversal
tasks.acceptance: Absolute paths like C:\Models\model.gguf validate successfully; traversal attempts rejected

tasks.description: Update validate_directory() with same path handling improvements
tasks.acceptance: Directory validation accepts legitimate absolute paths; blocks traversal attempts

tasks.description: Add port whitelist validation for non-standard ports with explicit opt-in requirement
tasks.acceptance: Ports outside allowed set require explicit configuration; clear error messages guide user

tasks.description: Add source_name/display_name parameter through ingest pipeline from /ingest/file endpoint to DocumentProcessor
tasks.acceptance: Original filename flows from API endpoint through to document metadata without temp basename contamination

tasks.description: Implement filename sanitization function to prevent path traversal while preserving display name
tasks.acceptance: Sanitization removes traversal characters, reserved names; returns safe filename and original display name

tasks.description: Update DocumentProcessor.process_file() to use source_name parameter for metadata
tasks.acceptance: Process_file accepts source_name parameter and stores in metadata; existing behavior preserved when parameter not provided

tasks.description: Verify duplicate handling, deletion, document listing, and citations use stable source metadata
tasks.acceptance: All document operations reference stable source name; repeated uploads behave deterministically

phases.name: Phase 18: Align GUI, API, CLI, and Documentation

tasks.description: Audit README and documentation for drift between documented and actual behavior
tasks.acceptance: Documentation audit report lists all discrepancies; each discrepancy ticketed for resolution

tasks.description: Verify GUI upload capabilities match API surface or document intentional differences
tasks.acceptance: GUI and API upload capabilities documented; any intentional differences explained in README

tasks.description: Update settings labels and backend naming to match actual code behavior
tasks.acceptance: Settings UI labels match configuration options; backend names are consistent

tasks.description: Document actual backend precedence and configuration knobs accurately
tasks.acceptance: README accurately describes: GGUF → OpenVINO → OpenAI-compatible → Ollama fallback order

tasks.description: Audit AFOMIS.spec against current repository layout and update entry point and bundled paths
tasks.acceptance: Spec file references correct entry point; bundled paths match actual directory structure

tasks.description: Update build_exe.bat to validate prerequisites against correct paths
tasks.acceptance: Build script checks exist at correct locations; exits with clear error if prerequisites missing

tasks.description: Perform clean package build and document any issues encountered
tasks.acceptance: Clean build completes; build log documents any warnings or issues

tasks.description: Execute packaged application smoke test: launch, load GGUF, ingest document, answer question
tasks.acceptance: Packaged app passes all smoke test steps; any failures documented with root cause

phases.name: Phase 20: Regression Test Suite and Bug Ledger

tasks.description: Complete regression tests for all confirmed defects with PASS status
tasks.acceptance: All regression tests pass; each test would catch recurrence of its defect

tasks.description: Document final bug ledger with root cause, fix, and test for each defect
tasks.acceptance: Bug ledger is complete and accurate; can be used for postmortem analysis

tasks.description: Write postmortem analysis describing why regressions escaped and prevention measures
tasks.acceptance: Postmortem document exists with lessons learned and process improvements
